name: Catalogizer Performance Validation Test Bank
description: Performance tests for response times, throughput, concurrency, large payloads, caching, compression, memory, and database

steps.name: Warm up
steps.action: Send 3 GET /api/v1/health requests to warm connection pool

steps.name: Measure response time
steps.action: Send 20 GET /api/v1/health requests and measure each

steps.name: Populate test data
steps.action: Ensure at least 500 entities in database

steps.name: Populate test data
steps.action: Ensure at least 200 entities in database

test_cases.name: File listing with pagination responds under 500ms

steps.name: Navigate to directory with many files
Get entity by ID
steps.action: Send 20 GET /api/v1/entities/{id} requests for known entity

test_cases.name: Handle 25 simultaneous requests
test_cases.expected_result: 25 concurrent requests handled with 95%+ success rate

test_cases.name: Handle 50 simultaneous requests

steps.name: Measure success rate
steps.expected: No 500 errors, all responses are 200 or 429

test_cases.expected_result: 50 concurrent requests handled without server crash

test_cases.name: Mixed read/write concurrent operations

steps.name: Run mixed workload
steps.action: Simultaneously: 5 GET entity requests, 3 POST create requests, 2 PUT update requests

steps.name: Verify data integrity
steps.action: Check all created/updated entities have correct data
steps.expected: No data corruption from concurrent writes

test_cases.expected_result: Mixed concurrent operations maintain data integrity

test_cases.name: Concurrent search operations

steps.name: Verify result correctness
steps.action: Each search returns results matching its specific query
steps.expected: No result bleed between concurrent queries

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent searches return isolated correct results

steps.name: Populate large dataset
steps.action: Ensure at least 1000 entities in database

steps.name: Create deep hierarchy
steps.action: Create TV show with 10 seasons, each with 20 episodes

test_cases.name: Paginated navigation through large dataset

steps.name: Navigate all pages sequentially
steps.action: Request page 1, 2, 3, ... through all pages with per_page=50

steps.name: Measure consistent page time
steps.expected: No page takes more than 2x the average (no degradation)

test_cases.expected_result: Pagination performance consistent across all pages

steps.name: Measure connection time
steps.action: Establish 10 WebSocket connections to /api/v1/ws and measure each

steps.name: Measure message round-trip
steps.action: Send 20 ping messages and measure server response time

steps.name: Broadcast message
steps.action: Trigger event that broadcasts to all connected clients

steps.name: Send message burst
steps.expected: All messages accepted or rate limited gracefully

steps.name: Verify connection stable
steps.action: Send one more message after burst

test_cases.name: Static assets have cache headers

steps.name: Check ETag
steps.action: Inspect ETag header on static assets
steps.expected: ETag present for conditional request support

test_cases.expected_result: Static assets served with proper cache headers

test_cases.name: API response caching for repeated queries

steps.name: Verify cache hit
steps.action: Check for X-Cache-Status header or compare times
steps.expected: Second request faster due to cache

test_cases.expected_result: Repeated API queries benefit from caching

test_cases.name: Gzip fallback when Brotli not supported
test_cases.expected_result: Gzip fallback works when Brotli unavailable

test_cases.name: Compression does not add excessive latency

steps.name: Compare latencies
steps.action: Verify compression overhead < 50ms for typical responses

test_cases.name: Memory usage stable under sustained load

steps.name: Record baseline memory
steps.action: Check server memory usage via /metrics or process stats

steps.name: Run sustained load
steps.action: Send 500 requests over 60 seconds (mix of reads and writes)

steps.name: Check memory after load
steps.action: Record memory usage after load test
steps.expected: Memory increase < 50% of baseline (no unbounded growth)

test_cases.expected_result: Memory stable under sustained load, no leak

test_cases.name: Memory stable with many WebSocket connections

steps.name: Hold connections for 60 seconds
steps.action: Keep connections alive with periodic pings

test_cases.expected_result: Memory recovered after WebSocket connections closed

test_cases.name: No goroutine leak under load

steps.name: Check goroutine count
steps.expected: Goroutine count within 10% of baseline (no leak)

test_cases.expected_result: No goroutine leak after processing requests

test_cases.name: Database query performance with index
test_cases.expected_result: Indexed queries complete within 500ms on 5000 records

test_cases.name: Database connection pool under pressure

steps.name: Send concurrent database-heavy requests
steps.action: Send 25 concurrent requests that each perform multiple DB queries
steps.expected: All requests complete (some may queue at pool)

steps.name: Verify no connection timeout
steps.action: Check no 500 errors caused by pool exhaustion

test_cases.expected_result: Connection pool handles pressure without timeouts

steps.name: Measure total time
steps.action: Time from first to last insert

test_cases.name: SQLite WAL mode improves concurrent read performance

steps.name: Concurrent reads during write
steps.action: Start a write transaction and simultaneously send 10 read requests
steps.expected: Read requests complete without blocking on write lock

test_cases.expected_result: WAL mode allows concurrent reads during writes

test_cases.name: Scan performance on directory with 1000 files

steps.name: Verify completion
steps.expected: Scan of 1000 files completes within 120 seconds

test_cases.name: Scan does not block API responsiveness

steps.name: Measure API response during scan
steps.action: Send 20 GET /api/v1/health requests during active scan

test_cases.expected_result: API remains responsive during active scan

steps.name: Measure aggregation time
steps.action: Time from scan completion to all entities created

steps.name: Verify all entities created
steps.expected: Entities created for all recognized media files

test_cases.name: Sustained throughput of 50 requests per second

steps.name: Run k6 load test
steps.action: Execute k6 with 5 virtual users sending 10 req/s each for 30 seconds

steps.name: Verify p95 latency
steps.action: Check p95 response time from k6 report

test_cases.expected_result: 50 req/s sustained with 99%+ success and p95 < 500ms

test_cases.name: Throughput degrades gracefully under overload

steps.name: Ramp to 100 req/s
steps.action: Gradually increase request rate from 10 to 100 req/s

steps.name: Verify no 500 errors
steps.action: Check for server errors in responses

steps.name: Verify recovery
steps.expected: All requests succeed at reduced rate

test_cases.expected_result: Server degrades gracefully under overload without crashes

steps.name: Start server
steps.action: Launch catalog-api and measure time to first successful health check
steps.expected: Health check succeeds within 5 seconds of process start

test_cases.name: Server startup with existing database

steps.name: Start server
steps.expected: Server starts and health check passes within 10 seconds

test_cases.expected_result: Server starts within 10s even with large existing database

test_cases.name: Web app initial load under 3 seconds
Vendor chunk cached on subsequent loads

steps.name: First load
steps.action: Load web app, note vendor chunk download

steps.name: Second load
steps.expected: Vendor chunk served from cache (304 or disk cache)

steps.name: Measure load improvement
steps.action: Compare total transfer size on second load

test_cases.expected_result: Vendor chunk cached, subsequent loads faster

test_cases.name: Entity browser renders 100 cards smoothly
test_cases.expected_result: 100 entity cards render and scroll smoothly

test_cases.name: Search debouncing reduces API calls

steps.name: Count API requests
steps.action: Monitor network tab for search requests
steps.expected: Fewer than 5 search API calls (not one per keystroke)

test_cases.expected_result: Search input debounced to reduce API calls

test_cases.name: CPU usage stays under 40% during normal load

steps.name: Run normal workload
steps.action: Send 10 req/s for 30 seconds (mix of reads)

steps.name: Monitor CPU
steps.action: Check CPU usage via podman stats or top
steps.expected: catalog-api CPU usage < 40% of allocated cores

test_cases.expected_result: CPU usage within 30-40% host resource limit

test_cases.name: Memory usage stays under container limit
Disk I/O does not spike during entity queries

steps.name: Check disk I/O
steps.action: Monitor disk reads during cached queries
steps.expected: Minimal disk I/O (cache serving most requests)

test_cases.expected_result: Cache reduces disk I/O for repeated queries

steps.name: Send subsequent requests
steps.action: Send 20 more requests on same QUIC connection

steps.name: Measure latency reduction
steps.action: Compare first request latency vs subsequent

steps.name: Connect via HTTP/2
steps.action: Send request with HTTP/2 only (no QUIC)

steps.name: Measure response time
steps.expected: p95 < 600ms (slightly higher than HTTP/3 is acceptable)

test_cases.name: 30-minute soak test with stable memory

steps.name: Record baseline
steps.action: Note memory, goroutine count, open file descriptors

steps.name: Compare metrics
steps.action: Record memory, goroutines, file descriptors after 30 min
steps.expected: No metric has grown more than 20% from baseline

test_cases.expected_result: No resource leaks over 30-minute soak test

test_cases.name: Connection count stable over time

steps.name: Record baseline connections
steps.action: Note database pool open connections and active goroutines

steps.name: Run 500 requests with connection cycling
steps.action: Send 500 requests, each from a new HTTP client

test_cases.expected_result: Connections properly cleaned up after cycling

test_cases.name: Cold cache entity listing performance

steps.name: Measure warm cache query
steps.expected: Response faster than cold cache query

test_cases.expected_result: Cold cache query within 1s, warm cache significantly faster

test_cases.name: Cache eviction does not cause performance cliff

steps.name: Fill cache with diverse queries
steps.action: Send 200 unique search queries to fill cache

steps.name: Trigger eviction
steps.action: Continue sending unique queries to force eviction

steps.name: Measure performance during eviction
steps.action: Time requests during cache eviction phase
steps.expected: No request takes more than 2x the warm cache time

test_cases.name: Stress test ramp to 300 users finds breaking point

steps.name: Run k6 stress test
steps.action: Execute k6 stress_test.js ramping from 0 to 300 virtual users

steps.name: Identify breaking point
steps.action: Find the VU count where error rate exceeds 5%

test_cases.expected_result: Breaking point identified and server recovers after stress
